title: Is there a way to restrict the number of items per group?
excerpt:
Hi all, 
I would like to have a groups prio 1 , prio 2 and prio 3 and restrict either a number of items per each group or a total amount of hours. Is there a way to do it?

posts.author: Gauhar (Gauhar Kassymbek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
I would like to have a groups prio 1 , prio 2 and prio 3 and restrict either a number of items per each group or a total amount of hours. Is there a way to do it?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Gauhar, it’s a good question, and unfortunately there’s no way to restrict a number of items per group (although you could set board permissions so that certain people can’t create new items: Board Permissions)
